summary:
The presence of anosmia or ageusia is more commonly associated with COVID-19 than influenza, providing a useful distinguishing feature. Diagnostic tests can confirm infection by detecting SARS-CoV-2 specifically, enabling accurate differential diagnosis despite overlapping early symptomatology.  

Note that this summary only includes information directly derived from Agent1’s response; it does not add external knowledge or interpret beyond what was stated.
